texto: And that, I guessed, was the aim of the Lord Chamberlain's Men: to serve up rich helpings of life to their audiences, to introduce them to people they would never otherwise meet, to stretch their minds and heart to fill a greater world.
explicacao: Citação de J.B. Cheaney sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “And that, I guessed, was the aim of the Lord Chamberlain's Men: to serve up rich helpings of life…” articula reflexao, art, guessed em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: And that, I guessed, was the aim of the Lord Chamberlain's Men: to serve up rich helpings of life to their audiences, to introduce them to people they would never otherwise meet, to stretch their minds and heart to fill a greater world.

texto: Some part of me knew that I could play this part well, or better than well. But I was almost afraid to play it. The line between stage and life was so fragile here that I felt a risk of losing myself somehow.
explicacao: Citação de J.B. Cheaney sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Some part of me knew that I could play this part well, or better than well. But I was almost afra…” articula reflexao, art, could em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
